message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl

Routine checkpoint of local beads state into JSONL so the rest of
the frankensqlite working-tree changes in this batch can land on
a consistent baseline.  12 line delta against the previous sync
(09dfdc56 "after Track G certification work"); changes are local
status advances against existing bead rows, not new beads or
schema changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
